sections.subtitle: Team Form Analysis
sections.text: Napoli are in exceptional form, unbeaten in their last 10 matches with 3 wins in their last 5, showcasing strong attacking and defensive capabilities. Parma, however, are struggling with no wins in their last 3 matches, conceding goals consistently and lacking offensive punch. Napoli's superior league position (1st with 78 points) compared to Parma's 16th with 32 points further highlights the disparity in current form.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two head-to-head encounters, Napoli have dominated with wins in both matches (2-1 and 2-0), scoring late to secure victories. Parma have failed to keep a clean sheet against Napoli in their last 9 meetings, and historical data suggests matches between these teams often see over 2.5 goals (6 out of 8 recent games).

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics Overview
sections.text: Napoli lead the league with 57 goals scored and only 27 conceded, reflecting their balance in attack and defense. Parma have scored 41 goals but conceded 56, ranking poorly in defensive stats (16th in least goals conceded). Napoli's higher expected goals and big chances created per game indicate they are likely to dominate possession and shot opportunities.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Injuries
sections.text: Napoli's key players like Romelu Lukaku (13 goals, 10 assists) and Scott McTominay (11 goals, in-form with 8.3 average rating) are expected to influence the game significantly. Parma are missing important players like Milan Đurić (5 goals), which weakens their attack. Napoli's squad depth and quality give them a clear edge despite minor absences.
